div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
struct vm_area_struct {
vm_start, vm_end (virtual range)
vm_flags (VM_READ|WRITE|EXEC|SHARED...)
vm_file (file-backed mapping)
vm_pgoff (file offset in pages)
vm_ops -> fault, page_mkwrite callbacks
}
